message:
test(core): Add 137 new tests across rope, cursor, view, terminal_capabilities

Dramatically improve test coverage for core text and terminal modules:
- rope.rs: 52 tests (was 9) - edge cases, grapheme ops, 6 property tests
- cursor.rs: 43 tests (was 8) - navigation, wide chars, word movement
- view.rs: 47 tests (was 9) - scrolling, wrapping, virtual line mapping
- terminal_capabilities.rs: 35 tests (was 16) - terminal detection, mux, NO_COLOR

Part of bd-3ky.15 (OpenTUI Core Systems Test Suite)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
